close_reason: Completed: pydeps-gen implemented with pyproject.toml, requirements.txt, and PEP 751 pylock.toml support. Integrated into .envrc auto-regeneration.
description:
Create pydeps-gen tool that generates Buck2 targets from Python dependencies.

Options to explore:
1. Wrap pip to download wheels, generate python_library targets
2. Use Nix python packages and generate Buck2 targets from them
3. Integrate with pyproject.toml/requirements.txt

Similar pattern to godeps-gen:
- Parse pyproject.toml or requirements.txt
- Resolve dependencies (pip, poetry, or Nix)
- Generate python-deps.toml or BUCK files
- Support Nix-based third-party cell

See: examples/python-deps/ for the pattern
title: Python deps cell: pip-to-buck tooling
